entry.title: New: BILL017(25) (Honolulu) — BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Amends real property tax homeowner’s exemption base amount. Amends real property tax homeowner’s exemption for taxpayers 65 years of age or over. Effective upon approval and applies to tax years beginning July 1, 2026, and thereafter.

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
